title: Ores Galore
description:
A mod that adds ores and more

My first mod

Made using MCreator
body: This mod is first off, my first mod, second, it adds new ores, the main one appearing everywhere being the Operum Ore, it is quite overpowered and makes the game easy, so you will want to avoid that unless you do want the ore. There is Ender ore which requires a Chorus Pickaxe to mine, which the Chorus Pickaxe can be made using a new wood type being chorus planks, like any wood type, it uses a log, which can be crafted using 4 chorus fruit, There is also an end wood type in the creative inventory, Green Ender Ore which is more powerful than the ender ore. I also added a new block that can have flowers on it, which I also introduced the end flower, it can be used with chorus fruit to make chorus flowers. Currently, this mod is in beta, but hopefully it will be updated to a full release.
